description: You are an embedded systems engineer working on 'smarthub', a Python-based home automation core located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/smarthub. The system is experiencing critical reliability issues: event loop blocking during scene execution, logic errors in the 'Cinema Mode' automation, and device control failures where smart bulbs from a specific vendor are not updating their state correctly. Diagnose and fix the bugs in core/engine.py, core/rules.py, and core/devices.py to ensure the entire test suite passes. Do not modify the test files or hardcode return values to pass tests.
